concept: Build a shooter where you command a specialized pest control unit managing outbreaks of mathematically perfect insects that construct hazardous geometric hives. Target specific structural weak points using specialized equation-disrupting ammunition that destabilizes their impossibly precise formations. Contain infestations across diverse environments where each species exhibits unique geometric properties—honeycomb hexagons, spiral shells, fractal nests. Discover the source of these hyper-evolved insects whose collective intelligence appears to be solving complex mathematical problems through their expanding architectural colonies.
